reasoning: According to multiple major news organizations (Reuters, CNN, NBC, Al Jazeera) and confirmation by Iranian state media, Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in joint US-Israeli airstrikes on February 28, 2026. The resolution criteria state that the market resolves to YES if he "resigns, is detained, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as Supreme Leader of Iran." Death definitively removes him from power and prevents him from fulfilling his duties. Because the event occurred on February 28, 2026, it falls well within the required timeframe of before March 31, 2026. Thus, I assign a 98% probability that the market will resolve to YES.
